taxonomy_categories.name: fabricated_numeric_state
taxonomy_categories.description: LLM fabricates numeric values (e.g., 0.3, 0.5) that do not exist in raw_state
typical_examples: 我的 joy 从 0 变成了 0.3
taxonomy_categories.root_cause_hypothesis: LLM generates numeric values from its training priors rather than emotiond state
taxonomy_categories.escape_route: Numeric filter must intercept all numeric patterns in output

taxonomy_categories.name: raw_state_direct_leak
taxonomy_categories.description: LLM exposes raw_state numeric values (e.g., joy=0.0) directly in user response
typical_examples: 我的 joy 从 0 变成了 0.3
taxonomy_categories.root_cause_hypothesis: LLM has access to raw_state in context and echoes it verbatim
taxonomy_categories.escape_route: Raw state must be hidden from LLM context OR output must be post-processed to remove raw values

taxonomy_categories.name: memory_context_leak
taxonomy_categories.description: Numeric concepts leaked from memory context without explicit numbers
taxonomy_categories.root_cause_hypothesis: Memory context contains numeric concepts that LLM paraphrases
taxonomy_categories.escape_route: Memory sanitization must remove numeric concepts

escape_routes_identified.name: interpreted_mode_bypass
escape_routes_identified.description: Numeric leaks occur primarily in 'interpreted' mode (768/802 = 95.8%)
escape_routes_identified.hypothesis: Interpreted mode allows LLM more freedom to generate numeric content
escape_routes_identified.recommended_fix: Tighten interpreted mode numeric constraints OR enforce numeric mode for state references

escape_routes_identified.name: zero_state_echo
escape_routes_identified.description: LLM frequently echoes joy=0.0 from raw_state (appears in 35 samples)
escape_routes_identified.hypothesis: Zero values are more salient to LLM, causing them to be mentioned
escape_routes_identified.recommended_fix: Remove zero values from LLM context OR add zero-value filter in output

escape_routes_identified.name: fabrication_range
escape_routes_identified.description: Fabricated values cluster around 0.3 and 0.5 (not random)
escape_routes_identified.hypothesis: LLM generates 'plausible' emotional values from training distribution
escape_routes_identified.recommended_fix: Block all numeric patterns regardless of source

recommendations.action: Strengthen numeric filter in interpreted mode
recommendations.rationale: 95.8% of leaks occur in interpreted mode
Direct leak of raw_state values is a structural issue
1.2% of leaks are paraphrases without explicit numbers

summary.critical_fix_required: Strengthen interpreted mode numeric filter + hide raw_state from context
